contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Oracle QMDJ chart — inline per-palace explanation panel
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/oracle/pull/18
  
  Details:
  Operator pain: reading a QMDJ chart on oracle.truesight.me required scrolling between the 3x3 grid and the 'What does each part of the chart mean?' details block to figure out what was being suggested in each palace. The bounce broke the reading flow.
  
  Shipped: a contextualized explanation panel that sits between the 3x3 grid and the 三吉門/三凶門/三奇/值符 legend block. Tap (or keyboard-activate) any palace and the panel below populates with that cell's specific Spirit / Star / Door / Heaven plate / Earth plate, each with a one-line meaning. The existing curriculum-level <details> glossary stays in place below — the new panel is a reading aid, not a replacement.
  
  Defaults to 值符 (Director) palace on every render so the interaction teaches itself on first load — the panel is never empty under a freshly cast chart. Falls back to first non-empty cell, then center, if the chart somehow lacks a 值符 location.
  
  Implementation:
  - New .qmdj-detail container inserted between #qmdjGrid and .qmdj-legend
  - Cells become role=button, tabindex=0, aria-pressed=true|false (full keyboard + screen-reader support via Enter/Space)
  - Selected cell gets a 3px accent ring + soft drop shadow on top of any existing 值符/值使 styling
  - Outlook chip in the panel header mirrors the per-cell tint so the heuristic stays linked to the explanation
  - 值符 / 值使 / Center palaces surface role markers in the panel
  - resetQmdjPanel clears the detail panel too — no orphaned state when the chart unmounts
  - Toggling Day-anchored / Hour-based re-renders the grid AND re-defaults the panel to the new 值符 palace
  
  Dictionaries (palace / door / star / spirit / stem) mirror the existing glossary tables but live in JS as one-line summaries, so the panel doesn't have to scrape the DOM for content. ~280 lines added to index.html, no other files touched.
  
  PR: TrueSightDAO/oracle#18 (squash-merged a63af87).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
